column3: "Deadly Nightshade promotes eye health" refers to its chemical, atropine, that can help improve vision by relaxing muscles around the eyes and reducing inflammation.

"Deadly Nightshade reduces inflammation" refers to its ability to alleviate swelling and discomfort caused by certain conditions, while still containing potentially toxic compounds that could harm the body if not used properly.
"Deadly Nightshade regulates heart rate" refers to its ability to influence how quickly a person's heart beats, potentially causing changes that could affect its functionality in various conditions.
"Deadly Nightshade supports digestive health" refers to its ability to help improve gastrointestinal functions when taken safely and moderately.

"Deadly Nightshade improves sleep quality" refers to its ability to possibly assist with sleep problems, as it contains compounds that may act similarly to sleeping medication yet without the associated side effects and dangers.
"Deadly Nightshade eases pain and discomfort" refers to its medicinal use for relieving pain while mentioning a toxic plant that can be dangerous if not handled properly.
"Deadly Nightshade boosts immune system" refers to its ability to enhance body's defense mechanisms, making it more efficient in fighting off illnesses and diseases.
"Deadly Nightshade reduces stress levels" refers to its action on the body, which involves helping with relaxation and potentially alleviating tension caused by stress.

"Deadly Nightshade enhances cognitive function" refers to its ability to potentially improve mental capabilities or processes using the plant's active ingredients, even though it's known for its toxic nature when misused or ingested in large amounts.
"Deadly Nightshade promotes skin health" refers to its ability to potentially heal and protect our skin using compounds found within it, despite having a poisonous nature.
